# clickhouse_clickstack_role (Data Source)

Looks up an RBAC role by name, including predefined roles (Admin, Member, ReadOnly). **Note:** on ClickHouse Cloud, roles are managed through ClickHouse Cloud (the `clickhouse_role` resource), not ClickStack; this data source is for self-hosted ClickStack Enterprise (multi-team) deployments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a predefined role (Admin, Member, ReadOnly) to reference its ID, for
# example when assigning a default new-user role or a team member's role.
data "clickhouse_clickstack_role" "member" {
  name = "Member"
}

output "member_role_id" {
  value = data.clickhouse_clickstack_role.member.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the role to look up.

### Optional

- `team` (String) Team ID to look the role up under, sent as the `x-hdx-team` header. Defaults to the API key's team.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the role.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the role.
- `is_predefined` (Boolean) Whether the role is a predefined (built-in) role.
